See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 2572220 => 'Bujumbura', 2572221 => 'Bujumbura', 2572222 => 'Bujumbura', 2572223 => 'Bujumbura', 2572224 => 'Bujumbura', 2572225 => 'Bujumbura', 2572226 => 'West zone', 2572227 => 'Rural areas', 2572230 => 'North zone', 2572240 => 'Central east zone', 2572250 => 'South zone', ];
